response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, including C++ and distributed systems, but his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8 years of C++ experience, leadership in large-scale infrastructure projects, or direct cloud architecture experience. His roles emphasize full-stack development and open-source contributions, which are valuable but not fully aligned with the technical leadership requirements for a cloud compute platform.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications (Dlang, Node.js)
Proven experience in mentoring and technical leadership (Refactoring Dojos, Code Kata, workshops)
Diverse technical expertise across web, mobile, embedded, and cloud-like platforms (Kubernetes, MCP)
concerns: Limited explicit C++ experience (only 1 year at National Instruments; others focus on scripting languages)
No clear evidence of managing large-scale cloud infrastructure or compute technologies
Lacks direct experience with cloud architecture or DevOps in a production-level capacity
